subcodes.first_line: O dear friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, thy letter which thou hadst written through Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه شما که باقا سید اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @review of publications
